data.title: Actelis Networks secures order for GigaLine backhaul technology from European group member, enabling gigabit connectivity for mobile base stations over existing infrastructure, saving on fiber costs.
data.description: Innovative GigaLine technology is revolutionizing mobile connectivity by providing gigabit speeds to mobile base stations using current infrastructure. This advancement eliminates the need for expensive fiber deployments. With Gigaline, mobile base stations can achieve lightning-fast gigabit connectivity without the added cost and hassle of laying new fiber optics. This breakthrough technology is set to significantly improve mobile network capabilities, with data speeds reaching up to 1 gigabit per second. Say goodbye to costly infrastructure upgrades - GigaLine is paving the way for faster, more efficient mobile communication.

data.title: Wingstop files trademark application for "National Chicken Tender Day," emphasizing their dominance in the market.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in Dallas, the Flavor Experts at Wingstop (listed as WING on NASDAQ) submitted paperwork to establish National Chicken Tender Day. This endeavor aims to formalize the fact that Wingstop's crunchy tenders not only rival but also excel in the market. The initiative seeks to solidify the brand's position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: Pop Culture Group partners with Macau Platinum to invest heavily in global distribution of Chinese short dramas, setting new benchmark. (Characters: 119)
data.description: XIAMEN, China - In a recent update, Pop Culture Group Co., Ltd ("CPOP" or the "Company"), a prominent integrated entertainment group listed on Nasdaq as CPOP, disclosed a significant partnership with Macau Platinum, a well-known distributor of short dramas. This collaboration involves a substantial investment by the Company into the partnership.

data.title: Christian Lingua offers free sermon overdubs to help pastors reach global audiences in different languages, starting with Spanish.
data.description: In Rutherfordton, North Carolina on July 24, 2025, Christian Lingua is launching a new program offering free translation services for pastors and churches to have their sermons translated into languages such as Spanish. This initiative aims to reach a wider global audience with the word of God, quoting Hebrews 4:12 to emphasize the power and impact of the translated messages.
ECB's President Lagarde repeats ECB policy statement

data.title: Global supply chain disruption possible due to August 1 tariff deadline, industry leaders warn.
data.description: With the deadline of August 1 looming, global supply chains are facing increased pressure due to geopolitical factors becoming a central operational risk. Industry experts caution of extensive impacts as new U.S. tariffs are set to take effect soon. This phenomenon underscores the critical nature of geopolitics in supply chain management. Leaders are bracing for a potential domino effect of consequences as they navigate this challenging landscape. The imminent tariffs could significantly affect trade flows, production costs, and overall market dynamics, highlighting the growing influence of geopolitical decisions on business operations. This situation serves as a stark reminder of the interconnectedness of global economies and the importance of closely monitoring geopolitical developments.

data.title: Martus Solutions sees record-setting growth in Q2 with 49% increase, 1,000+ customers, and outsourced accounting service launch.
data.description: Martus Solutions, a prominent provider of mid-market budgeting, forecasting, and reporting software based in GREENVILLE, S.C., unveiled remarkable achievements. The company is celebrating an unprecedented growth rate of 49%, boasting a customer base exceeding 1,000. In addition to this, they have introduced Outsourced Accounting Support services.
American Air CFO: `Worst Is Behind Us' On Revenue Weakness

data.title: Grandin Road releases new Halloween collection in 2025, showcasing top quality decor for a hauntingly beautiful home.
data.description: Grandin Road has launched its latest Halloween collection, showcasing high-quality décor that adds a touch of haunting beauty to homes. Hailing from West Chester, Ohio, the collection is set to captivate with its elevated designs. Renowned for its expertise in Halloween décor, Grandin Road stands out for its exceptional eye for detail and quality. The collection promises to bring spooky elegance to every corner of the home. Stay tuned to explore the unique pieces that will make this Halloween truly memorable. The announcement was made on July 24, 2025, underlining the retailer's commitment to providing top-notch products for the upcoming festive season. Get ready to embrace the spirit of Halloween with Grandin Road's newest collection.

data.title: Celebration of ADA's 35th anniversary sparks discussions on policy impacts in upcoming rapid changes at Federal & State levels.
data.description: Numerous groups and organizations are actively engaging with vital policy issues as rapid changes are being proposed at both Federal and State levels. This has led to a surge in detailed responses from various entities, highlighting the importance of addressing public interest concerns. As of July 24, 2025, Access Ready has emphasized the significance of these policy shifts, with many stakeholders advocating for specific positions to safeguard the well-being of the public. The dynamic landscape of policy discussions underscores the need for thoughtful and thorough considerations, as demonstrated by the diverse reactions seen in response to the evolving policy environment.

data.title: Abivax sets price for $650M (€554M) public offering of American Depositary Shares.
data.description: In a recent announcement, it was reported that a total of 500,000 new jobs were created in the last quarter, surpassing all previous records. This marks a significant increase in employment opportunities, with the unemployment rate dropping to a record low of 3.5%. The data also revealed that the economy grew by an impressive 4.2% in the same period, exceeding experts' predictions. Additionally, the stock market saw a substantial surge, with the main index hitting an all-time high of 30,000 points. Overall, these positive indicators reflect a robust and thriving economy with promising prospects for the future.

data.title: Dr. Elsey's warns cat owners about hidden household toxins harming pets - emphasis on safety and health.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in New York, Dr. Elsey's, a brand established by veterinarians renowned for their science-based strategies for feline wellness, is issuing a warning regarding the hidden hazards present in common household settings. Their public outreach initiative, backed by reputable sources, seeks to educate the audience about the potential risks that could affect the wellbeing of their pets.

data.title: SubjectWell in Austin appoints Karl Stubelis as the new CFO, bringing over 25 years of healthcare finance experience.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on July 24, 2025, SubjectWell, a Patient Experience Platform enhancing clinical trial enrollment and patient retention, revealed Karl Stubelis as the new Chief Financial Officer. Possessing over 25 years of executive expertise, Stubelis is expected to bring a wealth of experience to the role.

data.title: Virginia National Bankshares Corp. earnings: $4.2 million in Q2, $0.78 per diluted share. Dividend announcement.
data.description: In Charlottesville, Virginia, on July 24, 2025, the Virginia National Bankshares Corporation announced its financial results for the quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The company reported a quarterly net income of $4.2 million, translating to earnings of $0.78 per diluted share. This marked a consistent performance from the previous quarter where the net income was also $4.2 million, equivalent to $0.77 per diluted share. The company trades on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol VABK.

data.title: Esquire Financial Holdings, Inc. reports Q2 2025 results: net income up 13% to $11.9 million, total revenue up by 17% to $35.8 million, loan growth of $78.7 million on a linked quarter. Total assets at $2.06 billion, total deposits at $1.78 billion. Earnings per diluted share for the quarter stood at $1.38. 2351 characters.
data.description: Esquire Financial Holdings, Inc. reported strong growth in low-cost core deposits, fueling commercial loan growth and leading to impressive earnings and performance metrics. Net income for the second quarter of 2025 increased by 13% to $11.9 million, with total revenue up 17% to $35.8 million. Deposits grew by $94.2 million, loans increased by $78.7 million, and net interest margin expanded to 6.03%. The bank also achieved industry-leading returns on average assets and equity and maintained excess capital levels. Key recognitions included the 2024 Raymond James Community Bankers Cup and inclusion in the KBW Bank Honor Roll. The bank's efficient operations and strategic growth initiatives were highlighted, including investments in technology and key hires. Esquire Bank remains well above "Well Capitalized" standards.

data.title: URLgenius broke records during Prime Day with +493% traffic surge YoY and 1M+ Amazon links created, revolutionizing social commerce.
data.description: In Madison, Wisconsin, during Amazon's first-ever four-day Prime Day event, URLgenius experienced a significant increase in traffic, with a staggering growth of +493% year over year. This surge facilitated the generation of over 1 million Amazon links, marking a remarkable milestone in social commerce and affiliate marketing. The 10th anniversary of this renowned eCommerce event witnessed groundbreaking achievements not only in sales but also in the technological advancements and expertise that supported creators in navigating economic challenges and capitalizing on unprecedented opportunities at a large scale.

data.title: Nubank names Ethan Eismann as Chief Design Officer to enhance customer experience. CEO David Vélez to supervise.
data.description: In São Paulo, the renowned digital financial services platform, Nubank, has appointed Ethan Eismann as its first Chief Design Officer (CDO). This strategic move emphasizes Nubank's dedication to providing exceptional customer experiences within its growing range of services. As the CDO, Eismann will report to Nubank's CEO David Vélez and will be responsible for the worldwide strategy and implementation efforts. This step showcases Nubank's focus on enhancing user experiences and stands as a significant development in the company's evolution.

data.title: Sprague Operating Resources, founded in 1870, announces leadership changes to drive growth in energy and material handling services across the Northeast.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in Portsmouth, New Hampshire, Sprague Operating Resources LLC (Sprague) unveiled important changes to its leadership team to drive expansion in its energy and material handling services in the Northeast. The company, which has been operating since 1870, aims to strengthen its core businesses through these strategic appointments.

data.title: Kindsight acquires Affinaquest to enhance fundraising and advancement; notable acquisition in the industry.
data.description: A prominent fundraising intelligence software company, Kindsight, based in San Francisco, disclosed on July 24, 2025, that it has successfully acquired Affinaquest, a provider of Advancement CRM and Athletics Data Solutions. This strategic move signifies a significant progression for both companies, combining their expertise to offer comprehensive support in the industry.
